mnemonics.title: Bayes' Theorem Components
mnemonics.content: BAYES: Base rate (prior), Alternative hypothesis, Your evidence (likelihood), Explanation (posterior), Sum (normalization). Use B.A.Y.E.S. to remember the components of Bayes' Theorem.

mnemonics.title: Prior vs Posterior
mnemonics.content: Prior = Pre-evidence belief (what you thought BEFORE seeing data). Posterior = Post-evidence belief (what you think AFTER seeing data). Think: priOR = befORe, posteriOR = after.
